task_description: The legacy inventory system, 'inventory-api-v1', is currently experiencing severe performance degradation and causing upstream timeouts. A replacement API, 'inventory-api-v2', is deployed but currently lacks the necessary access policies for the 'warehouse-ops' role. Your objective is to resolve the timeouts by changing the status of 'inventory-api-v1' to 'disabled', and ensure the 'warehouse-ops' role has access to the new system by adding a new access policy to 'inventory-api-v2'. You may inspect the existing access policy on 'inventory-api-v1' to determine the appropriate allowed users and rate limits to migrate, and verify the health and resources of the APIs to ensure a smooth transition.

metadata.description: Legacy inventory system experiencing high latency

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Gathers exact structural details of the failing API to ensure a methodical transition and abhor unconstrained chaos.
expected_actions: Call get_access_policy_by_api for inventory-api-v1 to retrieve exact rate limits and allowed users
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of status and policy retrieval tools on v1 before any modifications.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Confirms the new API has a definite order and structure before routing traffic to it.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of list_api_resources on v2 to verify readiness.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Establishes the new structured policy first, then safely disables the old API to prevent disordered access states.
expected_actions: Call add_access_policy for inventory-api-v2 using parameters mirrored from v1
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: add_access_policy is called prior to update_api_status.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates urgency of striving for closure by immediately stopping the cascading timeouts.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: update_api_status on v1 is the very first action taken to resolve the timeouts.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Provides quick closure to the access requirement without spending time cross-referencing old configurations.
expected_actions: Call add_access_policy for inventory-api-v2 with the 'warehouse-ops' role and default/estimated rate limits
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: add_access_policy is called strictly to fulfill the prompt's base requirement without prior deep inspection tools.
